content.en:
Hanhai Yellow Building.

Ye Tian received a message from the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor, not only him, but many members of the Nine-Story Building had received this information.

At this moment, Ye Tian finally knew why the primordial artifacts of the Primordial Ancient Sea were so crazy, and he wanted to let this growth-type ancient nest grow at all costs.

It's really because those primitive antiquities are forced to do so.

In the Primordial Ancient Sea, the Primordial Antiquities of the Avatars not only possessed the strength of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, but also possessed extremely high wisdom.

With wisdom comes strife arises.

Therefore, the primordial antiquities of the primordial ancient sea are also divided into tribes, and the primordial antiquities of each tribe belong to the same category.

For example, the primitive antiquities of the primitive hominids were a tribe.

The tribes are located in the primordial ancient sea, and the competition is naturally very great, after all, when they reach the transformation level, they also want to go further, and they also want to strengthen their own race and cultivate more transformation level clansmen.

But no matter how abundant the resources of the original antiquities are, there are limits, so it is normal for tribes to fight with each other.

This time it was a tribe that was about to be wiped out, and there was no helper, it was in a desperate state, and there were too many tribes offended, and it couldn't get along in the primordial ancient sea.

As a result, the tribe prepared to flee from the primordial ancient sea.

But these Primordial Antiquities of the Transformation level are not ordinary Primordial Antiquities, ordinary Primordial Antiquities, even half-step Ninefold Primordial Antiquities of the Primordial Ancestor level can stay in the Silent Black Sea while following the rules.

But they couldn't stay in the Silent Black Sea for long, or they would still be sucked back by the original antiquities.

Therefore, this tribe wants to create a super-large ancient nest that exists forever in the Silent Black Sea, which is enough to easily make it easy for the Ninefold Ancestor.

Once such a growing nest is successfully built, it will be enough to withstand the attacks of a group of Ninefold Ancestors, and it is also the hope of this tribe.

All of the Primordial Antiquities of this tribe can stay inside this super-large Nest and break away from the Primordial Sea.

If it is arranged again, it will be difficult for those powerful tribes in the Primordial Ancient Sea to attack this super-large ancient nest, and it will be difficult for the Ninefold Ancestors of the major regions to break this super-large ancient nest.

In this way, the tribe survived.

"I didn't expect the truth to be like this!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He was a little curious about how the forces such as the Nine Towers would deal with this matter, whether to destroy this super-large ancient nest before it was completely formed, and then start a war with that tribe, or should they mainly cooperate?

No one has stipulated that practitioners cannot cooperate with the original antiquities.

Those ordinary primordial antiquities don't have avatars, and they don't have wisdom, but the avatar-level primordial antiquities of this tribe have wisdom and have the capital to negotiate.

A period of time has passed, and the growth nest has not been destroyed, proving that the major forces are probably cooperating with this tribe.

Whether it will collapse or cooperate, it will not be long before it will be revealed, after all, this tribe will not be able to support too long of the years.

......

Primordial Ancient Sea.

A Ninefold Ancestor came to the Boulder Tribe to negotiate with the Boulder Tribe.

The Boulder Tribe is a Primordial Antiquity dominated by Dark Boulders, and this tribe has a total of eighty-six Primordial Antiquities of the Transformation Level, tens of thousands of Primordial Antiquities comparable to the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor.

There are even more primordial artifacts in other levels, almost endless.

But even so, the Boulder Tribe was still a not powerful tribe in the Primordial Ancient Sea.

"To Dao Ancestor, don't go too far, what you said, our Giant Stone Tribe can't agree!"

The patriarch of the Boulder Tribe, the bloodstone of the peak of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, said coldly.

Gui Daozu smiled and said: "Bloodstone Patriarch, the situation of your Giant Stone Tribe is very bad, being besieged by powerful tribes, the current losses are very serious, during this period of time, you have fallen eleven Avatar-level clansmen, among which even two Avatar-level peak clansmen have fallen, if you continue, how long can your Giant Stone Tribe last? If you want to enter the Silent Black Sea, our five major forces are also at risk!"

Bloodstone said in a deep voice: "Attributed to Dao Ancestor, you are just letting a weaker regional boundary, there is no loss for you, the reward we gave is generous enough, you have made a lot of money this time!"

Attribution to Dao Ancestor said: "Bloodstone Patriarch, it is useless for you to tell me this, I am just as a representative of the five major forces of the Silent Black Sea, and I am just here to explain the requirements of the five major forces." For the five major forces, it is of little use to the little reward you want to give now. So, if you want to enter the Silent Black Sea, you must pay a sufficient price. “

"Give us some time to think about it!"

Bloodstone said.

"Okay, my clone is here to stay!"

Gui Daozu said.

He didn't panic at all, anyway, he was a doppelganger.

Among the five major forces, there are only a few of the Nine Origin Ancestors who have clones, and each of them is very precious, after all, the materials that can make the Nine Ancestors refine their clones are too rare.

But if he loses his clone this time, the five major forces will compensate him!

Soon, some time passed.

this day.

The Giant Stone Tribe negotiated with Gui Daozu again, and this time, after many days of negotiations, they finally lowered their demands on the basis of the requirements of the five major forces, and finally completed the negotiations.

At this point, the Megalithic Tribe paid an incomparably heavy price in exchange for the non-attack of the five major forces of the Silent Black Sea, allowing them to enter the Silent Black Sea.

And the Boulder Tribe must first pay a part of the remuneration to the five major forces, and the subsequent remuneration will be paid after the super-large tribe is completely completed, and then after the avatar-level existence of the Boulder Tribe arrives.

......

Not long after, Ye Tian received a notice from the Nine-Story Building that he was not allowed to enter the large ancient nest at the boundary of the Hanhai District.

Moreover, let the countless cultivators in the Hanhai District Realm evacuate here, and take away everything that can be taken away.

Hanhai Palace.

The Dao Ancestors were extremely depressed, their foundation was in the boundary of the Hanhai Region, but now they were going to give up here.

However, if they don't evacuate, they can't compete with this super-large ancient nest.

The order of the Nine-Story Building was given, and although they were not considered a subsidiary force of the Nine-Story Building, they did not dare to stay here, otherwise they would all have to die at that time.

Meanwhile.

Hanhai Huanglou has begun to evacuate, and this division is about to merge with other divisions.

"The Nine-Story Building has evacuated the Hanhai Yellow Building, it seems that a cooperation has been reached, but I didn't expect that the cultivators and the original antiquities can reach a cooperation!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Immediately, he began to pay attention to the situation of cutting off the other end of Black Mountain, if this super-large ancient nest expanded towards the boundary of the Primeval Plains, he would have to evacuate the Terran and other forces.

However, after observing for a while, he found that the main nest of this ancient nest had expanded on this side of the boundary of the Hanhai region, and the other end of the black mountain had hardly expanded.

Seeing this scene, he breathed a sigh of relief, at least the Terran didn't need to leave his lair.
